stubs.intent: Implement a selection-scoped Atelier Collaboration Panel in editor surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Suggestions never change text outside selected span

stubs.intent: Implement LensExtractionTier as a first-class runtime and planning input.

Tier0/Tier2 override intent is trace-visible

stubs.board_registry_state: stub backlog; high value; high risk; blocked

acceptance_criteria: Explicit job/workflow/tool mappings

acceptance_criteria: Uncaptioned video produces searchable timestamped transcript

stubs.board_registry_state: stub backlog; high value; high risk; blocked

acceptance_criteria: Versioned structured file family

preserved_intents: Atelier/Lens remediation must preserve role claiming, SceneState, ConflictSet, selection-scoped patching, role suggestion provenance, extraction tier, and ViewMode projection law.
Photo Studio remediation must preserve skeleton surface, thumbnails, and recipes.
Studio runtime must become traceable across jobs, tools, DCC/operator views, Flight Recorder, Locus, and storage backends.
Stage/media artifacts must use portable manifests, bundle indexes, source hashes, retention evidence, and replayable provenance.
ASR and transcript lineage must preserve timing anchors, source media identity, media probe facts, local-first execution, and searchable transcript linkage.
Loom/video archive must preserve LoomBlock identity, captions sidecars, transcripts, poster frames, tags, mentions, search facets, and large-library usability.
Validated and superseded stubs must remain source evidence or inherited requirements, not be silently dropped during CKC consolidation.

conflicts.summary: Atelier-Lens-v2 and Photo-Studio-v2 have sparse machine contracts but meaningful Markdown projections.
conflicts.risk: CKC drops original gap intent because draft_scope is empty in JSON.
conflicts.layered_handling: Preserve Markdown gap list as source material and create fresh CKC refinements with explicit acceptance.

conflicts.summary: Validated work still has stub artifacts under the stubs directory.
conflicts.risk: Agents may reopen completed work or treat historical stubs as executable.
conflicts.layered_handling: Keep validated work as baselines; CKC only adds deltas.

conflicts.summary: Superseded visual stubs are still needed as CKC validation requirements.
conflicts.risk: CKC GUI work loses screenshot and visual regression evidence.
conflicts.layered_handling: Inherit through Kernel002/Kernel003 visual evidence paths; do not reimplement unless coverage is missing.

conflicts.summary: Stage/media foundation is high priority but marked blocked by downstream-facing packets.
conflicts.risk: Downstream bridge/archive work invents manifest semantics before backend portability is settled.
conflicts.layered_handling: Create CKC foundation WP first, then consume it from bridge/archive WP.

conflicts.summary: ViewMode projection can conflict with raw evidence preservation.
conflicts.risk: SFW projection mutates or hides raw evidence in a way that breaks replay/audit.
conflicts.layered_handling: ViewMode is projection-only; raw artifacts and evidence refs remain immutable.

conflicts.summary: Media Downloader v1 is superseded by v2 but contains detailed source-mode requirements.
conflicts.risk: Instagram, forum, captions, progress, and output layout requirements are lost.
conflicts.layered_handling: Use active v2 as dependency while preserving v1 requirements as historical source material.

conflicts.summary: Activation checklist paths reference old records locations.
conflicts.risk: Future activation edits target stale paths.
conflicts.layered_handling: Normalize future packet checklists to .GOV/roles_shared/records paths without editing historical stubs.

consolidation_decisions.reason: Foundation contracts must precede media bridge and archive UI consolidation.
Atelier/Lens/Photo/Studio gaps share runtime visibility and projection concerns but should reuse validated selection/ViewMode law.
Archive usability depends on Loom identity, preview, caption/transcript search, and active downloader outputs.
It is Lens-pattern-adjacent but not media/Atelier consolidation scope.

consolidation_decisions.decision: Inherit visual validation requirements through Kernel visual surfaces.
consolidation_decisions.reason: They are superseded but still define required evidence behavior for GUI CKC work.

proposed_registry_changes: Add base entries for WP-CKC-001-Media-Lineage-Artifact-Foundation, WP-CKC-002-Atelier-Lens-Studio-Runtime, and WP-CKC-003-Loom-Archive-Media-Intelligence after operator approval.
Add source_material links from each CKC runway WP to every preserved source stub.
Use considered_by_ckc before activation; only use supersedes_by_consolidation after signed CKC packets exist.
Normalize new packet checklists to .GOV/roles_shared/records/TASK_BOARD.md and .GOV/roles_shared/records/WP_TRACEABILITY_REGISTRY.md.
Clarify WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v4 state because task board and registry text disagree.
Record validated baselines separately from superseded historical evidence.
Add do-not-edit-historical-stub notes for validated and superseded source stubs.

Portable manifest schema for media capture sessions.
Bundle index schema for media and transcript artifacts.

Transcript artifact schema with timing anchors.

Source media to transcript lineage edge.
Transcript to searchable consumer lineage edge.

Debug bundle export anchors for media sessions.
Deterministic replay checklist for media lineage.
Validation fixtures for source hash and timing anchor preservation.
Migration note from Stage/media stubs into CKC runway.

Selection-scoped patch law reuse from Atelier Collaboration Panel.
Raw artifact immutability under ViewMode switching.
Studio job kind and workflow node inventory.
PostgreSQL-only state contract with no-SQLite tripwires.
GUI visual evidence requirement import from Kernel visual stubs.

Active Media Downloader v2 dependency check.
Media Downloader v1 source-mode preservation matrix.
Output root and output layout preservation.
LoomBlock wrapper contract for video assets.
Content hash dedup across repeated promotions.

Visual validation evidence for archive UI and previews.
